speaker: OTHELLO
text: These letters give, Iago, to the pilot

speaker: OTHELLO
text: And by him do my duties to the Senate.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: That done, I will be walking on the works.

speaker: IAGO
text: Well, my good lord, I’ll do ’t.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: This fortification, gentlemen, shall we see ’t?
